name: Baby Shark Game Online
description: BABY SHARK FISHING GAME: Features artwork with kids' favorite, adorable characters from the world of Pinkfong's Baby Shark—Mommy Shark, Daddy Shark, Grandma Shark & Baby Shark! LET'S GO HUNT: Grab your fishing rod and catch as many fish as you can as the gameboard spins in this fun and interactive classic fishing game with a Baby Shark twist! Reel in the most fish to win!
instructions: the upward movement by pressing the up down movement by pressing the down arrow shoot by pressing the Shift key or touching the game for mobile devices
tags: Adventure, Baby, Baby Hazel, Game, Online, Shark
